sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_edges (edge UInt64, origin UInt64, destination UInt64);
UPDATE h3_edges SET origin = h3GetIndexesFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge).1 WHERE edge = 1248204388774707199;
SELECT h3GetIndexesFromUnidirectionalEdge(edge) AS indexes FROM h3_edges WHERE edge = 1248204388774707199;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM h3_edges WHERE origin != 0 OR destination != 0;
